heading: Egypt View
heroSubtitle: A Tourism and Consulting Company Based in Egypt and Japan.

aboutParagraph: A tourism company based in Egypt and Japan; a co-managed company of Japanese and Egyptian, with the aim of supporting customers who are confused by different cultures and customs in Egypt and Japan.
mission1: Providing a service that allows tourists to enjoy world-class Egyptian heritage.
mission2: A proposal for social activities that allow Egyptian heritage to be preserved for the future.
mission3: We believe that small joys leads to a big future.
vision: To deliver Egypt untraditional tours and requested services consultations smoothly for all our clients.
roleDescription: In Japan, assistant teacher of the human resources development department of a foreign company. Assisted cultural and research people at universities and research institutes. Egypt Air travel department Karnak Japanese branch affiliated local staff. For 20 years, I have been working in support of people in all fields.

arrangement: We can organize any tour from Japan and Egypt international airports including:
arrangement3: Custom-made tours from/to Egypt; including Cairo, Luxor, and Hurghada.
toursTitle2: Airport Transfer and Visa Purchase Support
support: At our airport transfer, we pick you up from teh immigration gate. We will assist you in purchasing entry visas, filling in entry cards, and cashing. Staff will guide you to the transfer car to the hotel.
toursTitle3: Nile Cruise, Lake Nasser Cruise Arrangement
cruise: Choose from the wide selection of cruise ships to suit your budget and schedule.
toursTitle4: Model Plans for Domestic Arrivals and Departure
plans1: Grand course for sightseeing in Egypt, such as the Great Temple of Abu-Simble, the Valley of the Kings in Luxor, and the Great Pyramids of Giza.
plans2: Travel around Islamic mosques and Christian churches.
plans3: Diving tours at the Red Sea Resort, Sharm-Elsheikh, and Hurghada.
plans4: Tour to enjoy Roman ruins and Mediterranean seafood in Alexandria.
plans5: Bahareya oasis, Siwa oasis and other desert tours.
maniac: Staff who have studied Egyptian archeology can arrange sightseeing at archeological sites and museums throughout Egypt.
translationTitle: Interpreting, Translating, Guiding, Cultural Mutual Understanding Support
translationParagraph: Dispatch of interpreters and guides to Egypt and neighboring countries. Support for culture shock and daily life in which Japanese living in Egypt and Egyptians going to Japan in fall.
permissionsParagraph: Support researcher's survey and coverage application; There are places in Egypt where foreigners are restricted. Procedures such as application of entry permit such as ruins, photography permission application. Advance appointments of Egypt companies, factories, and farmers. Attendant on the day of visit, interpreter. Support for follow-up surveys after visits.
